channel.title: Posts on Embedinker Labs
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Embedinker Labs

item.title: Meet Mia: The Shaded Mascot on the Banner
item.description: She’s a street cat who understands human speech, negotiates company perks, and has a very specific corporate contingency plan if we ever run out of food.

item.title: SchedulerPro - a simple calendar planner - with spreadsheet input
item.description: A slightly older product we’ve built - is a  Round-Robin priority scheduler, published  in internal Embedinker marketplace: access is by invite only
